raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I purchased a membership from XXXX for XXXX. I cancelled it 2 days later and got a confirmation email. Weeks went by and i still didn't receive my refund. I asked Citi to step in and they did. I was given the credit. They asked me to submit the documents. It either slipped my mind or they didn't give me the email to send it to. Months go by and the credit is reversed. I'm out of the XXXX  and when I get back I was going through a move and didn't see it. I finally reach out to Citi and asked them why it was closed and they tell me they didn't get the documents. I offer to submit the documents but I kept hearing that the case couldn't be opened. Weeks go by and I finally get it opened, they said to submit the documents, I did. I opened my account again and they said it was closed because the time frame for the case being opened is too long. Case number : XXXX
